name: Neroli Portofino
editorial: Neroli Portofino captures the feeling of stepping onto the Italian Riviera. Bright citrus, aromatic herbs and clean white florals create an atmosphere of understated luxury.
consultant: Perfect when you want to smell fresh, polished and quietly expensive.

name: Prada L'Homme
editorial: Prada L'Homme is a masterclass in understated elegance. Clean, refined and effortlessly professional.
consultant: One of the safest recommendations for office and everyday elegance.

name: Bleu de Chanel EDT
editorial: The benchmark for versatility. Fresh enough for daytime and refined enough for evening.
consultant: If you only own one fragrance, this is an excellent place to start.

name: Terre d'Hermès EDT
editorial: Earthy citrus with remarkable maturity and confidence.
consultant: Ideal for someone who prefers character over loudness.

name: Dior Homme Original
editorial: An artistic iris fragrance with timeless sophistication.
consultant: Perfect for someone who wants to smell distinctive without being loud.
